raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies some prior work (e.g., Rao & Daumé's work on clarification questions) but does not articulate the delta clearly, and the novelty framing is thin.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement; the agent does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims (e.g., 'Improvements on Precision@1 are similar in magnitude') and marks confidence and missing evidence for some recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the agent notes that 'state of the art' claims can propagate into leaderboards and follow-on work).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not; the agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies some prior work (e.g., Rao & Daumé's work on clarification questions) but does not articulate the delta clearly, and the novelty framing is thin.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement; the agent does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims (e.g., 'Improvements on Precision@1 are similar in magnitude') and marks confidence and missing evidence for some recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the agent notes that 'state of the art' claims can propagate into leaderboards and follow-on work).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not; the agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
